name: Alice's Mom's Rescue
short_description: Alice's Mom's Rescue is a puzzle-platformer game. The giant raven has captured Alice's mother. Help Alice save her mother through the 3 worlds and 25 levels! Change Alice's height by jumping on the magic mushrooms to get through the tiny spaces.
detailed_description:
Alice's Mom's Rescue is an indie puzzle / platformer game in the pure style of old school pixel art.
The Giant Raven Has Captured Alice's mother.
Help Alice save her mother through the 3 worlds and 25 levels!
Change Alice's height by jumping on the magic mushrooms to get through the tiny spaces.
But be aware that a small size will also affect Alice's physical abilities!
Solve puzzles, beware of the evil cats, birds, bats & spikes, and find the right path to victory.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese
